top3.sql:
WITH school_reading_scores AS (
    SELECT 
        s.CDSCode,
        s.School,
        s.County,
        AVG(sa.AvgScrRead) AS avg_reading_score
    FROM schools s
    JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
    WHERE s.Charter = 'Y'  -- Virtual schools are typically charter schools
    GROUP BY s.CDSCode, s.School, s.County
),
ranked_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        School,
        County,
        avg_reading_score,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY County ORDER BY avg_reading_score DESC) AS ...

WITH top_virtual_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        s.School,
        s.County,
        AVG(sa.AvgScrRead) AS avg_reading_score
    FROM schools s
    JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
    WHERE s.Charter = 'Y' AND s.School LIKE '%Virtual%'
    GROUP BY s.School, s.County
),
ranked_virtual_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        School,
        County,
        avg_reading_score,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY County ORDER BY avg_reading_score DESC) AS county_rank

WITH school_reading_scores AS (
    SELECT 
        s.CDSCode,
        s.School,
        s.County,
        sa.AvgScrRead
    FROM schools s
    JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
    WHERE s.Charter = 'Y'
),
ranked_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        School,
        County,
        AvgScrRead,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY County ORDER BY AvgScrRead DESC) AS rn
    FROM school_reading_scores
)
SELECT DISTINCT School
FROM ranked_schools
WHERE rn <= 5;
